description_long: This is a compact, submachine gun-style firearm with a matte black finish and a robust, utilitarian design. The upper receiver features a series of circular cooling holes along the barrel shroud, which is cylindrical and extends slightly beyond the front of the weapon. The grip and trigger assembly are integrated into a single, ergonomic unit, and a rectangular box magazine is inserted vertically in front of the trigger guard. The rear of the weapon is capped with a solid, slightly angled butt, lacking any visible stock extension or padding. Minimal external controls are visible, with a simple charging handle and a basic iron sight system mounted along the top. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with some polymer components for the grip and magazine.
description: A compact, matte black submachine gun with a perforated barrel shroud, box magazine, and integrated grip. The design is robust and utilitarian, with minimal external features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the perforated barrel shroud, box magazine, and integrated grip with a solid rear butt.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, cooling holes, and the vertical alignment of the magazine and grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and barrel shroud.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the solid butt end, with the barrel and magazine aligned centrally.
attribute_barrel_type: standard cylindrical barrel with ventilated shroud
